summary: Completed testing of School Landing Page features and EUR currency formatting. All backend APIs working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Main LMS frontend (admin dashboard, Payments, Admissions) all displaying EUR currency correctly. School landing page app running on localhost:3001.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - non-critical hydration warning

passed_tests: Public courses API /api/courses/public returns 200 with list of courses
Public course detail API /api/courses/public/{course_id} returns course with modules
Public course API returns 404 for invalid course ID
Admin login with admin@unilms.edu/admin123 works correctly
System config returns EUR as default currency
Application creation validates course existence (returns 404 for invalid)
Application creation flow initiates Stripe checkout
Admin Payments page displays amounts in EUR (€) format - verified €500,365.00, €315.00, €50.00
Admin Admissions page displays EUR currency - verified €0 Total Revenue
School landing page app running on port 3001
School app Tailwind CSS configuration correct
action_items: School landing page runs on localhost:3001 - for external access via preview URL, routing/nginx configuration may be needed
Fix HTML nesting warning in Dashboard.js - <span> wrapping table rows
critical_code_review_comments: School app .env uses http://localhost:8001/api which is correct for local testing
Supervisor config for school uses different API URL - may need update for production
Minor: unused imports in school/src/App.js (Play, Star, Calendar, navigate)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Main LMS frontend working, EUR currency verified

seed_data_creation: Test application created during API testing (TEST_Integration User)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School landing page features verified. Public courses API working without authentication. EUR currency formatting working on admin Payments and Admissions pages. School app running locally on port 3001 - may need nginx route or build for external preview access.
